top_signals.title: US Stocks Hit Records on Iran Deal Report as Oil Pares Gains
top_signals.summary: Stocks climbed to fresh records Thursday after reports of a deal between the US and Iran fanned optimism that the conflict is inching toward an end.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Hit Record Highs After US-Iran Deal Reports: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks to all-time highs, bonds rose while a rally in oil waned amid speculation about a diplomatic breakthrough in the three-month war that has rattled markets around the world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Exchange of letters between the Governor and the Chancellor regarding CPI Inflation - April 2026
top_signals.summary: Exchange of letters between the Governor and the Chancellor
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Zscaler CEO: Anthropic's Mythos Has Added 'Fuel to the Fire'
top_signals.summary: Zscaler CEO Jay Chaudry expects says the company's track record is 'very good' when it comes to revenue, and that Anthropic's Mythos has added 'fuel to the fire' on cybersecurity.. The security software company gave a fourth-quarter revenue forecast earlier this week that was weaker than expected. Evercore downgrades the stock, noting slowing net new customers.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Financial stability vulnerabilities remain elevated as geoeconomic shock unfolds
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump Jr.-Backed Drone Stock Soars 57% on US Funding Hopes
top_signals.summary: Shares of drone makers and suppliers rallied Thursday after a report said the Trump administration is exploring potential funding deals with a group of companies to increase domestic production and lower costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dell shares jump 5% after server maker reports fastest sales growth since return to public market in 2018
top_signals.summary: Dell has gone from being a sleepy legacy tech company to a high-growth AI story, assembling servers packed with graphics processing units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Okta tops first-quarter results on agentic AI demand
top_signals.summary: CEO Todd McKinnon said Okta is "playing a long game" on AI and is allocating more resources to agentic tools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Luis de Guindos: Financial Stability Review - May 2026
Bitcoin bids farewell to CME futures gaps with $67K still on the radar
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin approached the final week of CME futures gaps with several still open, providing potential BTC price targets as low as $67,000.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cruise giant Carnival confirms data breach affecting nearly 6 million people
top_signals.summary: The company said the threat actor gained access to a limited portion of its IT environment last month after compromising an employee account. By the end of April, Carnival determined that the attacker had copied personal information from its systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: The world comes to Xi Jinping  Financial Times
